title: Scalable Session Management
description: Evaluate the architectural trade-offs between stateless JWTs and stateful Redis-backed sessions. Implement high-speed token revocation strategies for active user sessions. Design 'Logout Everywhere' functionality and prevent token bloat in session management.
objectives: Evaluate the architectural trade-offs between stateless JWTs and stateful Redis-backed sessions.
Implement high-speed token revocation strategies for active user sessions.
Design 'Logout Everywhere' functionality and prevent token bloat in session management.
